mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_reviews ( id, place_id, review_id, google_place_id, reviewer_name, profile_url, profile_picture, is_local_guide, total_reviews, total_photos, rating, description, language, review_date, images, likes, content_hash, is_deleted, authenticity_score, authenticity_level, score_calculated_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{placeId}, #{reviewId}, #{googlePlaceId}, #{reviewerName}, #{profileUrl}, #{profilePicture}, #{isLocalGuide}, #{totalReviews}, #{totalPhotos}, #{rating}, #{description}, #{language}, #{reviewDate}, #{images}, #{likes}, #{contentHash}, #{isDeleted}, #{authenticityScore}, #{authenticityLevel}, #{scoreCalculatedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO place_reviews ( id, place_id, review_id, google_place_id, reviewer_name, profile_url, profile_picture, is_local_guide, total_reviews, total_photos, rating, description, language, review_date, images, likes, content_hash, is_deleted, authenticity_score, authenticity_level, score_calculated_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{review.id}, #{review.placeId}, #{review.reviewId}, #{review.googlePlaceId}, #{review.reviewerName}, #{review.profileUrl}, #{review.profilePicture}, #{review.isLocalGuide}, #{review.totalReviews}, #{review.totalPhotos}, #{review.rating}, #{review.description}, #{review.language}, #{review.reviewDate}, #{review.images}, #{review.likes}, #{review.contentHash}, #{review.isDeleted}, #{review.authenticityScore}, #{review.authenticityLevel}, #{review.scoreCalculatedAt}, #{review.createdAt}, #{review.updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE place_reviews SET place_id = #{placeId}, google_place_id = #{googlePlaceId}, reviewer_name = #{reviewerName}, profile_url = #{profileUrl}, profile_picture = #{profilePicture}, is_local_guide = #{isLocalGuide}, total_reviews = #{totalReviews}, total_photos = #{totalPhotos}, rating = #{rating}, description = #{description}, language = #{language}, review_date = #{reviewDate}, images = #{images}, likes = #{likes}, content_hash = #{contentHash}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, authenticity_score = #{authenticityScore}, authenticity_level = #{authenticityLevel}, score_calculated_at = #{scoreCalculatedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM place_reviews ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT * FROM place_reviews WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = false) ORDER BY authenticity_score DESC NULLS LAST, likes DESC, review_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT * FROM place_reviews WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = false) ORDER BY authenticity_score DESC NULLS LAST, review_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT AVG(authenticity_score) FROM place_reviews WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND (is_deleted IS NULL OR is_deleted = false) AND authenticity_score IS NOT NULL
